projectDescription: A feature-rich companion application for VRChat that provides friend management, activity tracking, customizable dashboards, VR overlay, and more — all outside the VRChat client.
keyFeatures: Friend, world, and avatar list management with activity tracking
Customizable multi-panel dashboard with Feed, GameLog, and Instance widgets
Powerful search across users, worlds, avatars, and groups
Activity heatmap showing friend online patterns
Screenshot metadata storage to remember in-game locations
VR overlay with live event and notification feed
Discord Rich Presence with world thumbnail and join button
Social status presets for quick status switching
Auto-restart and rejoin last instance on VRChat crash
Export/import friends list, avatars, notes, and favorites
Themes support for custom VRCX appearance
Upload and manage avatar/world images without Unity
publicApiSurface: VRChat API integration (auth, friends, worlds, avatars, groups, notifications)
AppApi (C#/.NET bridge between Electron and VRChat logic)
SQLite database for activity and screenshot metadata
IPC bridge between Electron main process and Vue renderer
OpenVR overlay interface for VR headset support
Screenshot metadata schema (PNG chunk embedded JSON)
Pinia stores for state management (friends, feed, gameLog, dashboard, etc.)
Auto-launch manager for companion app orchestration
